name: Cinematic Short: Abstract color transitions evolving from rigid geo

workflowDef.name: Cinematic Short: Abstract color transitions evolving from rigid geo

params.prompt:
You are a film director planning a short film. Concept: "Abstract color transitions evolving from rigid geometric primary colors, melting into fluid complementary blends, and vaporizing into atmospheric hazy neon". Mood: hypnotic.
Plan exactly 3 scenes. For each scene, write a vivid image generation prompt (2-3 sentences) describing the visual.
Output ONLY a JSON array of strings, one prompt per scene. Example: ["scene 1 prompt", "scene 2 prompt"]

params.description: hypnotic visual style for a short film about: Abstract color transitions evolving from rigid geometric primary colors, melting into fluid complementary blends, and vaporizing into atmospheric hazy neon

params.prompt: Scene 1 of 3 from a hypnotic short film: Abstract color transitions evolving from rigid geometric primary colors, melting into fluid complementary blends, and vaporizing into atmospheric hazy neon. {{style.template.promptTemplate}}

Scene 3 of 3 from a hypnotic short film: Abstract color transitions evolving from rigid geometric primary colors, melting into fluid complementary blends, and vaporizing into atmospheric hazy neon. {{style.template.promptTemplate}}
hypnotic cinematic shot: {{desc0.description}}. Slow camera movement, atmospheric lighting.

Image analysis failed: Input is not a valid image (starts with: b'\xd5\xff_\xd1\xf7\x1a\xd7\xb6\xdf\xe1\xbe\xbbk\x86\xf8{\xcf5\xf7\xcf')

plan.text: ["A stark, minimalist composition of razor-sharp geometric shapes in saturated primary red, blue, and yellow against a deep black void. The forms vibrate with mathematical precision, creating a hypnotic, rhythmic pattern of intersecting planes and hard-edged shadows.", "The rigid edges liquefy into a viscous, swirling tide of molten paint, where primary colors bleed into deep violets, burnt oranges, and emerald greens. Thick, marbled ribbons of complementary hues coil around each other in a slow-motion aqueous dance, creating a dense, tactile surface of shifting gradients.", "The fluid matter dissolves into a weightless expanse of luminous gas and iridescent vapor, glowing with soft neon pinks and electric cyans. Shimmering particles float through a dense, atmospheric haze where light diffuses into infinite, dreamlike gradients, stripping away all form into pure, hypnotic radiance."]

template.promptTemplate: A hypnotic short film visual of {{texture_state}} {{geometric_form}} with a {{color_palette}}, illuminated by {{lighting_effect}}, captured with {{cinematic_look}}.

values.text: bold De Stijl red and blue

desc1.analysis: Abstract 3D digital render featuring a surrealist blend of geometric and fluid elements. An angled close-up depicts matte primary-colored cubes partially submerged in thick, glossy rainbow liquid. The viscous paint creates marbled swirls that contrast with the rigid blocks. The subject is set against a dark void filled with cyan and magenta volumetric smoke. Soft backlighting produces a lens flare and sharp reflections on the liquid surface. The palette moves from vibrant primaries to a neon spectrum. Technical aspects include shallow depth of field and high-resolution textures. The mood is kinetic and vibrant, balancing industrial structure with organic, psychedelic chaos.
